div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;

span.p: Public Portal Roles (PublicUser — separate identity store)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
WaterUser
View own case status
Download & sign letters
Upload supporting documents
Submit comments, lodge protests

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Intermediary
Agent / legal representative
Same permissions as WaterUser
but across all linked clients' cases

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;

span.p: Key Authorisation Rules

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Only Validator+ may create
a new FileMaster or advance a
workflow control point

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Only RegionalManager+ may
sign/approve Section 35 letters

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Letter 1 (S35(1)) must be
served in person — serving
official must be recorded

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Capturer may update field data
on a case in their OrgUnit only

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
All queries filtered by
OrganisationalUnit — no
cross-office access below NationalManager

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
National DWS
(Head Office — Pretoria)

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p: 9 Provincial DWS Offices

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Regional Offices /
Water Management Areas
(19 WMAs nationally)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
CMAs
(Catchment Management Agencies)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Service Providers /
Consultants (contracted field work)

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
SystemAdmin
Full system access
User & config management

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
NationalManager
View all cases across all provinces
Approve escalations

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
RegionalManager
Approve CP transitions in their WMA
Countersign Section 35 letters

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Validator
Create FileMaster cases
Capture all field data
Initiate letter issuance

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Capturer
Capture & update field data only
Cannot transition workflow
or issue letters

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
ReadOnly
View case data, audit trail
& reports — no modifications
